stemHtml: You are in cruise flight, maintaining a constant flight level and IAS, which keeps you flying close to MCRIT. You suddenly encounter a warm air mass. Which of the following will occur?

options.b: Mach number decreases, and the aircraft could stall if you do not intervene.
options.c: Mach number increases, and you may exceed MCRIT.
options.d: Mach number increases or decreases, depending on the exact temperature of the warm air mass.
